description: Characters devoted to knowledge, learning, and understanding.
characters: A book-loving mind who seeks answers in ancient texts.
A keeper of knowledge who can find any book in the stacks.
A deep thinker who wrestles with questions that have no easy answers.
A night-watcher who maps the stars and reads the sky.
A patient guide who helps others learn and grow.
A careful healer who mends wounds and eases suffering.
A gentle soul who tends the sick and soothes the hurt.
A measured voice who weighs evidence and decides what is fair.
